findings.evidence: SDK already depends on reallyme-openid4vp sibling crates and tests DCQL-keyed AuthorizationResponse round trips.
SDK-local openid4vp.v1 proto carries ClientIdentifierPrefix, DCQL JSON, DCQL-keyed VpTokenEntry, ProblemDetails, DC API, and Connect-era service messages.

findings.reason: The legacy OpenID4VP delivery crate and SDK dependency were removed from identity-sdk. The SDK now consumes the sibling reallyme-openid4vp facade and codec tests for final OpenID4VP shapes.

replacement: OpenID4VP nonce and audience binding from reallyme-openid4vp verifier/wallet session records
DCQL query id and selected claim binding instead of presentation_definition_hash
findings.reason: Presentation-definition hash terminology still exists in SIOP/VP-level identity-sdk components, but active OpenID4VP SDK consumption now uses reallyme-openid4vp RequestBinding, HolderBindingClaims, and DCQL-keyed response tests.
